programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: On the Isle of Wight, restorer Ronnie relives his past life in Ibiza via a three-wheeled trike.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch yesterday's new episode, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: When Cliff gets ill, Norm helps him by delivering the mail, but gets arrested for allegedly tampering with the post.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: An absurd bet that Sam made during his wild days comes back to haunt him when the man he made the wager with shows up. If Sam can't triumph, he must forfeit the bar.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's reputation as a ladies' man takes a battering when a journalist comes to the bar to report on Boston's singles scene and is irked by his smugness.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's shocked when she suddenly realises that she wishes her own mother was more like Marie..

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra thinks that it's Ray's turn to take charge of birth control, so he decides to have his 'wires cut', but then chickens out..

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert decides that he's too old to be living with his parents, so he moves in with another elderly couple - who turn out to be carbon copies of Frank and Marie.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier shares an unexpected kiss with Julia while trying to steal files from her ex's office. Niles enjoys a trip to the shooting range more than he expected.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz prepares to leave the radio station and join a rival company, but not before voicing her concerns about Frasier's new relationship with Julia.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz isn't happy when the station announces that it's found her replacement. But if she stays, she'll have to put up with Frasier's new romance.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A Man, a Plan, and a Gal - Julia: Daphne and Niles have an important announcement to make, but Frasier's girlfriend steals their thunder.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon tries to transform New Jersey Italian restaurant Da Mimmo, which is run by a mother and her three sons - two of whom see the business as a failure..

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In North Wales, Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole meet Emma, whose father ran a haulage and motor repair business, to see what unloved items they can restore.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers help to prep award-winning animals at the Northumberland County Show, and visit stunning historical Corbridge.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lizzie and Paul love the seaside town of Paphos on Cyprus's west coast. Can Ben Hillman find them the perfect holiday home for the whole family, including their 10 grandkids, for £125k.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: There's a change in direction for Andy and Jules's Spanish cycle adventure business. On the Costa Cálida, mini golf course owner Ian launches a new tournament.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul dabble with DIY danger. Debbie and Dave overhaul a barn to launch a craft business. Tim and Krys revive a bland reception.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Andy and Kathy accidentally sold their house in the UK! Can the Garners find them their forever in in Almería? In Murcia, the Browns help Debbie and Jordan find a coastal escape.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: On the French Riviera, Paul takes control of a steam loco on the stunning Pine Cone line and rides in the cab of millionaire businessman Paul Ricard's private line.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne treats the contestants to a song, but not everyone appreciates it. A grunting Kumail Nanjiani embraces Amy Gledhill and Joel Dommett while they quiz him about a horse.

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Comedy with Nicola Coughlan and Lydia West. In her haste to grab an olive branch, Maggie takes the wrong meds, which makes being there for Eddie infinitely more chaotic.

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Comedy with Nicola Coughlan and Lydia West. When Maggie reunites with her estranged famous dad, Eddie pressures Maggie to let Whitney use him for Instagram clout.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Conspiracies and Coverups and the Housemaid.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Self-professed 'crazy camel lady' Sandra wants a mature man to ride off into the sunset with. Pansexual erotic writer Toni-Ann dreams of being the heroine in her own sexy novel.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Nicolle and Ben spice things up, but is Nicolle as happy with the night's climax as she seems? Thrill-seekers Katey and Dan pursue a live sex show experience.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Bijou New York diner The Mixing Bowl is haemorrhaging money thanks to manager Mike's out-of-control marketing plans. Can Gordon get things back on track.

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Edinburgh locals perform the one song that tells their story - from the tune a 22-year-old played at his mum's funeral to the Zach Bryan track that helped an ex-soldier with his PTSD.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke helps Joanna and Simon to transform their monster Victorian semi in Margate, and visits a beautiful Grade II listed Georgian manor conversion in Worthing.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottinghamshire, three rival couples compete in a week featuring a Second World War rations menu and revelations about unconventional living arrangements.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In the Welsh Valleys, sisters Carly and Holly ask Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien to dig out some treasure from their father's unwanted collection of furniture.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch yesterday's new episode, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: If Ever I Would Leave You: Carla's ex-husband Nick has been thrown out by his new wife Loretta. He comes grovelling back to the bar, promising to devote himself to Carla.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm's boss makes him an offer he can't refuse: accept a promotion or lose his job. So Norm finds himself in charge of firing other employees.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane decides to leave the bar and travel to Europe with Frasier. She wishes Sam would stop her from going, but he's too busy organising her farewell party.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's jealous when an inexperienced colleague beats him to his lifelong ambition of having an article published in Sports Illustrated.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's advice comes back to haunt him when he's blamed for the break-up of Robert's relationship with Amy.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank's not happy when Marie decides that they should both go on a strict diet just before Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The debonair conductor of the Seattle Opera (guest star Patrick Stewart) mistakenly believes that Frasier is gay and starts courting him.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: It's a battle of the Cranes as Frasier and Martin fall for the same woman - the boys' childhood babysitter.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier feels like a gooseberry on a night out with Niles, Daphne, Martin and Ronee, so Roz convinces him to go on a date with her friend Ann.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier overhears his dad's girlfriend Ronee making a date with another man, but when Martin hears the news, he accuses his son of eavesdropping.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon helps a Haitian juice bar and restaurant in Brooklyn. Jacques opened Juicy Box to provide healthier options for the neighbourhood, but it's fallen into chaos.

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Buckinghamshire, Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole help Hugh at his repair and upcycling shop.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers help out at the 191st Durham Regatta, discover the secrets of Durham Castle and explore the exotic wonders of Durham University Botanic Garden.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Motorbike lovers Carol and Mark dream of owning a holiday home in El Campello on the Costa Blanca. With a budget of £130k, will any of Laura Hamilton's properties get them revved up.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: In France, craft brewery owners Simon and Rebecca sink their savings into a new taproom. Can Natasha and Giles keep their Spanish restaurant-bar afloat.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Janet and Philip give their dining room a regal makeover. Donna and Paul push on with their mega renovation. Stephanie sets out to build a poulet palace.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, the Rodriguezes help dad and daughter Keith and Caitlin hunt for a family-friendly home. In Almería, the Garners search for the perfect project for Janet and Dave.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: A look at how the recent surge in immigration raids in Minneapolis by ICE left children traumatised. Families face difficult choices and continue to live in fear.

programme.title: Greggs vs McDonald's: The Fast Feud
programme.desc: How did Greggs steal McDonald's fast food crown and how is McDonald's fighting back? Dani Dyer explores this extraordinary fast food feud.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch the week's biggest and best TV. But what do they think.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Former nanny Amber wants to have beautiful babies on a farm, but does her dashing date have the film star looks she's after? A magician and a pole dancer are looking for love too.

programme.title: TFI Friday Unplugged
programme.desc: Chris Evans returns to Channel 4 with his iconic show. Tonight: Olivia Munn, Kris Marshall, Hard-Fi and Emma Laird join Chris for unfiltered conversation.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne treats the contestants to a song, but not everyone appreciates it. A grunting Kumail Nanjiani embraces Amy Gledhill and Joel Dommett while they quiz him about a horse.

programme.title: Pearl
programme.desc: Ti West's exuberant retro horror and prequel to X. Mia Goth is Pearl - a twisted Dorothy who wants to dance up the yellow brick road to movie stardom. Can a seedy projectionist help.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in Dublin
programme.desc: In Dublin, Joe Lycett and comedian Mawaan Rizwan visit talking statues, swim in 'scrotum-tightening' waters, and swig stout at the Guinness Storehouse.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jane and Amy host the first visit at Wisteria House in Hampshire. One guest gets picky at breakfast and 25-year-old Zak surprises his rivals when he reveals his hospitality experience.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Zak hopes to make his guests feel at home at The Living Room B&B in Bournemouth. But Jane and Amy encounter an eight-legged intruder, and David doesn't hold back at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike Lewis welcomes his rivals to The Valley Hotel on Anglesey, where there's an unwanted visitor in one of the bedrooms, and criticism leaves Mike looking for answers.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: David and Elvira host at Barratt's at Ty'n Rhyl in North Wales, where there are hairy encounters for each of their guests. And the feedback leaves the hosts feeling distraught.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: With the visits over, the B&Bers meet for one last time to confront their rivals, settle some cleanliness concerns and discover how much they've been paid, before the winner is announced.

programme.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
programme.desc: Dr Dawn Harper and Dr Ranj Singh take on a shaving foam marbling challenge. Chris Hollins and Laura Hamilton make paper gift bags. Debra Stephenson and Amanda Lamb create glitter cards.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie try to split up two couples to form the perfect couple to accompany them to the basketball. Arthur's parking ticket scam backfires badly.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to help Deacon out with the cooking and childcare over Thanksgiving, but things start to go wrong when Deacon tastes her food..

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon fight over a childhood toy, and chaos ensues when Arthur finds out what Carrie's getting him for Christmas.
